qa_pairs.question: Who should a user contact if their Alliance account renewal question is not addressed in the FAQ?
qa_pairs.answer: Users should send an email to renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca for assistance with their account renewal questions.

qa_pairs.question: What happens if a faculty member does not renew their Alliance account by the specified deadline?
qa_pairs.answer: If an active account belonging to a faculty member is not renewed between May 6 and June 9, 2026, it will expire and be automatically deactivated after that date. However, accounts can be reactivated at any time, even after deactivation.
